A.evidence: Faithful prose throughout, no garbling or loops. Equations rendered as clean $$ LaTeX (eqs 1-7 correct). Weakness: most section headings emitted as plain text ('1 Introduction', '2 Modification of...') with only a few '#'/'###' markers, so heading markup is inconsistent though reading order is correct.

B.evidence: Underlying prose is present and faithful, but multiple pages are dumped as raw JSON layout arrays ([{"bbox":...,"category":...}]) interspersed with the text, severely damaging structure and readability. Content duplicated inside the JSON blocks; math region reached only in plain-text tail.

C.evidence: Complete, faithful plain text with no token noise, loops, or hallucination. But no markdown headings at all and running page-headers ('Z. Huang et al.') left inline; equations degraded to plain inline form ('M = µmgr = 2 / 5 mr 2 β') rather than LaTeX, still readable.

D.evidence: Pervasive <|LOC_..|> coordinate tokens appended to most lines. Abstract and Introduction each duplicated. Hallucinated repetition loop of flowchart labels ('Decision layer + Motion planner + ... + Control system + Control system + Co'). Broken output.

E.evidence: Clean, consistent markdown headings (#/##/###), well-formed $$ LaTeX equations with numbers, figures captioned. Correct reading order. Minor: a few running page-headers ('2 Z. Huang et al.') left as inline lines between sections.

F.evidence: Cleanest conversion: consistent markdown headings, $$ LaTeX equations with \tag numbering, <sup> superscripts, best handling of running headers. Faithful prose. Minor: one running header mis-marked as a '#### 4 Z. Huang et al.' heading.

G.evidence: Proper ## headings and image placeholders, but ALL seven equations dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->'. Figure content leaks into the text flow: chart axis tick values ('0.6','0.4','-0.1') and flowchart labels ('Decision layer','Robots','rotate control') dumped mid-paragraph, disrupting reading order.

H.evidence: Proper ## headings and decoded $$ LaTeX equations (eqs 1-7 correct). Reading order clean. Deductions: degree symbols corrupted to 'GLYPH' ('0.087 GLYPH'), a stray 'Line chart' label near Fig. 9, and one dropped superscript ('Rong Xiong1').
